pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on scope grounds: out-of-scope work (3 anti-signals: training delivery, stakeholder engagement programs, or business development). Composite moderate-to-strong (0.4121). AIMS Manager interprets and applies regulatory requirements; does not build systems, deliver training curricula, or develop business cases.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in AI compliance role descriptions. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working AIMS Manager.
